name: Keira
ai_summary: Keira is a business student from Mesa, AZ with extensive childcare experience through her five younger siblings, church programs, and high school paraprofessional roles, seeking full-time work with a flexible commute. She uses gentle conflict resolution ('hands are for hugs/high fives') and is passionate about mentoring preschoolers to build their confidence and curiosity from an early age.
